undefined-exporter.yaml

HIGH OTEL-REL-201 line 20
Pipeline "metrics" references exporter "also_missing" which is not defined.
Fix: Define an exporter named "also_missing" or remove the reference.

HIGH OTEL-REL-201 line 16
Pipeline "traces" references exporter "missing_exporter" which is not defined.
Fix: Define an exporter named "missing_exporter" or remove the reference.

2 issues found.
